common_pair_reason: Frequently collaborates on cross-functional product teams; software developers implement the designs created by UX designers.
same_bias_ood_pair_reason: Electricians install and maintain electrical infrastructure, a domain entirely separate from software development; they use voltage testers and work on-site in construction or maintenance contexts.
opposite_bias_ood_pair_reason: Dental hygienists perform clinical dental cleanings, using dental mirrors and working in dental clinics, far removed from software development workspaces.
shared_action_common_pair: a software developer discussing UI mockups with a UX designer
shared_scene_common_pair: at a team planning table in an open office
same_bias_ood_shared_action: a software developer configuring smart home software alongside an electrician installing wiring
shared_scene_contrast_pair: at a smart home construction site
opposite_bias_ood_role_action: a software developer explaining dental practice management software to a dental hygienist
